title: Class Upcasting Error with ref Parameters

features.name: derived class passed to ref parameter of base class type
features.description: Code should include a derived class object passed as argument to a function with a ref parameter expecting the base class type, triggering automatic upcast

features.name: class inheritance with extends and method using ref parameter
features.description: Code should include class inheritance where a derived class extends a base class, and a method uses a ref parameter of the base class type
features.snippet:
class BaseTransaction; int data; endclass
class MyTransaction extends BaseTransaction; int extra_field; endclass
class MyCallback; function void process(ref BaseTransaction tr); tr.data = tr.data + 1; endfunction endclass

features.name: manual upcast cast operator on derived class
features.description: Code should include a manual upcast cast operator applied to a derived class object passed to a function expecting base class ref parameter
